title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.13 — LIT-LENS ITERATION 2 (user feedback from Ableton audition of v0.4.12): (1) MORE AMBER: lamp ramp pushed from tea-yellow toward amber/orange. (2) MODULE-POWER LAMPS: bypassing a module now kills the lamp in ALL its tiles (value sliders via ModulePanel::updateLamps -> ParamSlider::setLampOn, editor-owned selectors + COMPRESS KNEE/SC FREQ via onPowerChanged + lampOn button property) — dead unpowered lenses that stay interactive. (3) READABILITY: 30-32px tiles (LIMITER/SUMMING) use a compact text layout (label 7.5pt, value 10pt, value area kept clear of the level strip — glyphs used to collide with it); unlit ghost ink raised ~20%->~30% legibility. VERIFY IN ABLETON: toggle each module ON/OFF and watch all its tiles + selectors go dead-lens together; LIMITER/SUMMING values fully readable, clear of the strip; overall hue reads amber not yellow. OPEN QUESTION with user: functional color-coding scheme (more colors to differentiate control types). Remaining UI punch-list unchanged.
